page_metadata.biotools__summary: EllipTrack is a global-local cell-tracking pipeline for 2D Fluorescence Time-Lapse Microscopy. EllipTrack is a global-local hybrid cell tracker optimized for tracking modern large-scale movies. EllipTrack introduces a local track correction module.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EllipTrack is a global-local cell-tracking pipeline for 2D Fluorescence Time-Lapse Microscopy. EllipTrack is a global-local hybrid cell tracker optimized for tracking modern large-scale movies. EllipTrack introduces a local track correction module.
